reviews.comment:
Un verdadero desastre todo sucio la atención muy mala y los precios del servicompra  muy elevados mi experiencia no es un lugar recomendable

(Translated by Google)
A complete disaster, everything was dirty, the service was terrible, and the prices at the convenience store were very high. My experience is not worth recommending; it's not a place I would recommend.

reviews.comment:
Excelente estación al cliente. Lastima que el día que pase no tenían sistema, solo se podía pagar en efectivo.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent customer service. It's a shame that the day I went they didn't have their system working; you could only pay in cash.

reviews.comment:
Es la parada casi obligatoria en un viaje de Córdoba a Santiago del Estero...
Pero no tienen un lugar donde uno descansar, antes sabían tener un parquecito para donde uno descansar de viaje y los niños distender... Ese era un buen servicio

(Translated by Google)
It's practically a mandatory stop on a trip from Córdoba to Santiago del Estero... But they don't have a place to rest. They used to have a small park where you could relax during your trip and the kids could play... That was a good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNWcWFMeEhnEAE
